texto: A clear mission statement describes the values and priorities of an organization. Developing a mission statement compels strategists to think about the nature and scope of present operations and to assess the potential attractiveness of future markets and activities. A mission statement broadly charts the future direction of an organization. A mission statement is a constant reminder to its employees of why the organization exists and what the founders envisioned when they put their fame and fortune at risk to breathe life into their dreams.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Fred R. David sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “A clear mission statement describes the values and priorities of an organization. Developing a mi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, employment, entity, útil em momentos de viagem e entity.
